subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! Thy letter was received and its contents were understood. Thou didst request a missive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله نامه مرقوم واصل گردید و مضمون مفهوم شد تمنای تحریری از
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God
